arts.ttl: 'Pathetic': Graham Roberts takes aim at £27m Tottenham player after his display against Arsenal
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur supporters were once again left fuming at their team’s embarrassing defensive set-up at the Emirates with Radu Dragusin’s display being slammed. Ange Postecoglou’s...

arts.ttl: 'I've seen': Mikel Arteta makes comment about Arsenal's fans after 2-1 win over Tottenham
arts.sum: Arsenal restored some confidence and gained much-needed ground in the title-race after their 2-1 victory over Tottenham Hotspur in the North London Derby. Despite dominating...

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury, suspension list and return dates for Aston Villa: Calafiori, Saka, Jesus latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Arsenal's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Arsenal's crucial next six fixtures in Premier League title race as gap narrows
arts.sum: Liverpool have won three of their last seven matches in all competitions and there are fears Arne Slot's men could be in the middle of a blip for the first time this season, with Arsenal chasing them down

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou points blame at one person for Tottenham's defeat by Arsenal
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou has branded his side's performance against Arsenal "not acceptable" and admits the "responsibility lies with me" for their 2-1 defeat

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hails 'sensational' Arsenal and sends warning to Liverpool
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta was delighted with his side's performance as Arsenal beat rivals Tottenham 2-1 in the North London derby thanks to a Dominic Solanke own goal and a Leandro Trossard strike

arts.ttl: Declan Rice hits out at social media trolls over Arsenal star abuse: REAL FANS love him!
arts.sum: “You could see the reception before the game for Kai. It was unbelievable the cheer he got and what he's done for this team, the goals he scored at important times this year,” the England midfield said. Declan Rice has leapt to the defence of Arsenal team-mate Kai Havertz following the Gunners’ 2-1 North London Derby victory over Tottenham Hotspur on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky's error in the north London derby shows life comes at you fast, writes SAMI MOKBEL... how he bounces back could define the rest of his Tottenham career
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL AT THE EMIRATES: All of a sudden you're being billed as the next Tottenham No 1 for a decade. But then last night happens. A crash course in the perils of Premier League football.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice sends two-word message to Gabriel Magalhaes on Instagram after his stunning performance vs Tottenham
Man Utd transfer news: ‘MAJOR TWIST’ warning over Odegaard 2.0 as Arsenal and Chelsea plot hijack
arts.sum: As far back as September, Nypan was seen as an important January transfer target for the Red Devils, yet Ruben Amorim’s side have delayed over a deal and face the possibility of being beaten to the wonderkid by both Arsenal and Chelsea, according to GMS . Man Utd believe that they will be able to sign the teen if they bid around €17.8 million (£15m), which would make the Rosenborg starlet the second-most expensive player to come out of Norway behind only John Obi Mikel, who controversially moved to Chelsea and not Old Trafford in 2006 for €20m.
